title: AIR Plugins Index
description: Index of agent plugins available in this AIR configuration. A plugin is a packaging and distribution unit — a directory that can contain skills, hooks, MCP servers, and other components. AIR plugins are agent-agnostic and translated to agent-specific formats at session start time.

propertyNames.description: Plugin identifier key. Must be alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

Plugin.description: A plugin — a packaging and distribution unit that bundles skills, hooks, MCP servers, and other components into a single installable directory.

id.description: Unique identifier for this plugin. Must match the key in the parent object.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the plugin.

description.description: Concise description of what this plugin provides.

path.description: Path to the plugin directory, relative to the AIR config. The directory contains the plugin's components (skills, hooks, MCP servers, etc.).

homepage.description: URL to the plugin's homepage or documentation.

repository.description: URL or identifier for the plugin's source repository.

logo.description: Path or URL to the plugin's logo image.
